reviews.review_title: Good but what are the controls?
reviews.review_description: I can't figure out how to move and that defeats most of the games purpose, there is no menu button and no way to check controls, other than that it feels like the matrix.

I've never really though it was so easy to get really mad at VR games, but this game is so infuriating to me. Right off the bat it starts you off at the last level of SUPERHOT tier game. It is also almost a ripoff of Superhot, and you would much rather play that instead of this. The weapons are aimed strange and I've never shot with such a weird angled gun. The bullet capacity is so small too, we play VR and are not Navy Seals, this game is not that good in my opinion because of the gameplay. Also if someone says "ur aim is just bad fix ur wrist" like I'm gonna have to fix my wrist using surgery after bending my wrist trying to aim. I'm not gonna spend time on a game that uses a different mechanic for guns and is the only game that does that.

reviews.review_title: Need more time to find enemies
reviews.review_description: I don’t like this game I downloaded it thinking I would get a second to find the enemies but nope. On one of the levels they immediately shot at me with out giving me a second. Stupid game. Don’t download. A waste of space

It was not so hard for me, but my friend can't even shot the enemy :\
The game feels like running on 60 Hz, so I had headache.
It feels like a super hot ripoff. It’s good, but the bullets just move too fast and it crashes alot.
If I could give negative stars I would, the upgrades don't work all enemies shoot at once with aimbot it's absolutely retarded and unfair, this game should be wiped off of the universe its so bad

This is quite hard and demanding game when the enemy shot u you got to move out of the way in real world lol please be careful!! The want to do a forward roll to evade your enemy’s bullets is hard to resist so maybe play in your garden at night? I have uploaded my first experience to you tube ( my channel) can not wait for release of this and will buy in good work.
Would like to see multiplayer and Thumb stick movement or real layout movements option and what else u devs can do … good work out application.
Looking forward to the actual game :)

If your looking for a game to play after super hot this is it, it's like playing the matrix film the best part is falling down a skyscraper with agents jumping off the building trying to kill you, plus the slow motion is brilliant. FULL GAME PLEASE! Did I say this is FREE!
Its the best
It's cool but...

If you loved the matrix movies and the action scenes then you will love this game!  This game re-enacts some of the best scenes from the movies and lets you take out the agents in those scenes.  This game also allows you to practice fast reaction shooting and slow-motion aiming.   I can't stop playing it!!!!  I am recommending this game to all my friends on the Oculus.   THIS GAME IS SO MUCH FUN AND ROCKS!!!!!!
this game is great it just needs some work it's kanda like super hot really fun game

The hit boxes are horrific, the bullet will miss your head or arm etc and it says it kills you, not to mention sometimes the gun doesn’t even shoot where you aim it. You can aim perfectly to the head and it misses. Even body shots still would miss sometimes. Levels can be literally impossible to beat. It expects you to dodge 3 bullets at once as if you’re playing hole in the wall. Sure it’s about dodging but I mean every possible direction are bullets. I can dodge head on but when you have them against your back and above you its impossible.
best game ever i can`t wait for the full verson

If you wanted to shoot down agents and feel like ur in the Matrix then this game gets pretty freakin close a lot of the environments you get put in, feel like they are out of the movies , and yeah it’s hard but Agents are hard to beat and only the chosen will survive you are the chosen you gotta learn and apply I hope this helps others I give it a 8/10
great game
Most of the bad reviews are just people complaining that the game is too hard.

Super dope fun game idk why it has so many bad reviews people just suck at games lmao. Not impossible, guns dont suck, its just challenging which i personally enjoy, its like superhot but in real time.
